author: alexf5200
content: After hearing the discussion yesterday, from my perspective it seems like the headliner process might naturally be a two-step process, first picking a general theme (e.g. AA vs. encrypted mempools) without committing to any specific EIP, and then a couple of months later selecting a specific headliner EIP with commitment. It makes sense that only after EIP-8141 was proposed as a headliner it attracted a lot of attention and even counter-proposals, so at least some of the uncertainty seemed to come from the process itself.

author: ben_a_adams
content:
AA is a nebulous term and everyone probably has slightly different ideas on what it means.

Could we define the properties that are being looked for? Things that came up (though probably missed some):

* Key rotation
* Alternative Signing schemes (+social recovery/multisig)
* Tx sponsorship (aka Paymasters)
* Batching (though also one below)
* Programable wallets (smart contract holding assets)

author: ben_a_adams
content: AA is a nebulous term and everyone
